Sprint 1 Components Draft

Review of 5 shared components with 2 variants each. WDM/ERM demo data. STATUS: DRAFT

1. Triage Strip 2. Confidence Badge 3. Monitor Strip 4. Signal Panel 5. Monitor Overview

Triage Strip

Triage Strip — Variant A (Minimal)

Minimal variant for monitors with sparse data. KPI + Lead Signal + 2 chips + 1 delta item. No zone backgrounds — just dividers.

15
Rapid Decay countries
Hungary 6 days from pivotal vote; US executive–SCOTUS confrontation enters new phase
5 Recovery 13 Watch List
Critical Hungary

Triage Strip — Variant B (Standard)

Full 4-zone layout. Each zone has subtle left border accent. Default variant.

15
Rapid Decay countries
Hungary 6 days from pivotal vote; US executive–SCOTUS confrontation enters new phase
5 Recovery 13 Watch List DEMOCRATIC STRESS
Critical Hungary
High United States

Confidence Badge

Confidence Badge — Variant A (Pure Outline)

Completely neutral outline badges. All levels similar except opacity. Recedes visually.

Confirmed High Assessed Possible

Hungary election interference

... Critical Assessed

Confidence Badge — Variant B (Tinted Outline)

Subtle border tint for Confirmed (green) and Possible (faint). Maintains outline distinction from severity.

Confirmed High Assessed Possible

Severity (Filled)Confidence (Outline)
CriticalConfirmed
HighHigh

Monitor Strip

Monitor Strip — Variant A (Pill Row)

7 coloured pills, horizontally scrollable. Active pill filled. Compact navigation.

GMM SCEM FCW AGM WDM ESA ERM

Monitor Strip — Variant B (Compact Label Row)

Text-forward with small coloured dot indicators. Lighter colour presence.

GMM SCEM FCW AGM WDM ESA ERM

Signal Panel

Signal Panel — Variant A (Compact)

White panel, 3px accent left border. Minimal visual weight. Default for triage-heavy dashboards.

Amazon dieback rate accelerates; AMOC slowdown confirms new precursor threshold crossing

The Amazon tipping point probability has increased by 12pp this week as new satellite data confirms accelerated deforestation rates. AMOC slowdown measurements crossed the Boers et al. threshold, triggering a new precursor classification.

Issue 4 · W/E 6 April 2026 · Assessed

Signal Panel — Variant B (Accent Background)

Accent-tinted background + stronger left border. Use as dominant hero element. Dark accents require white text.

Amazon dieback rate accelerates; AMOC slowdown confirms new precursor threshold crossing

The Amazon tipping point probability has increased by 12pp this week as new satellite data confirms accelerated deforestation rates. AMOC slowdown measurements crossed the Boers et al. threshold, triggering a new precursor classification.

Issue 4 · W/E 6 April 2026 · Assessed

Monitor Overview Template

Monitor Overview — Variant A (Minimal)

Lighter colour presence. Neutral hero + accent borders only. Use for high-severity monitors (SCEM) or dense pages.

MONITOR OVERVIEW

Monitor Overview — Variant B (Rich)

Accent gradient hero + rich visual identity. ERM/GMM/AGM direction. Stronger monitor personality.
